planning_request.user_request: This is a completed read-only PRD audit, not an audit plan. Audit the canonical Korean PRD at /Users/hipgiinii/.hermes/projects/Sailing_training/prd.md for a browser-based educational sailing simulator. The user explicitly asks for a bounded three-turn discussion among Alfred, Claude, and agent_robin to make it specific and robust. Turn 1 needs concluded findings only: severity-ranked gaps, exact PRD sections/evidence, concrete replacement/addition recommendations, and unverified items. Do not write code or modify any files.
planning_request.desired_outcome: Return at most 8 high-value, evidence-grounded PRD hardening findings across learning design, simulation contract, safety/realism boundaries, content scope, acceptance criteria, browser UX/accessibility, observability, and rollout. Distinguish product decisions already confirmed from assumptions that must remain explicit.
known_context: Confirmed scope: desktop-first browser game; primary persona is sailing-course beginner; MVP is one virtual training water, one Training Sloop profile, and mandatory lessons L01–L05; weak gamification; live weather/tide API, high-fidelity CFD, actual navigation guidance, certification and multiplayer are excluded.
Long-term catalogue separates hull configuration from rig configuration. Korea coastal contexts (Yeongjong/Deokjeok) are static post-MVP scenarios only and must never imply navigational accuracy.
No repository or implementation exists. This audit must not authorize implementation.
constraints: Read-only audit; no code, Git, deployment, browser interaction, credentials, API calls, or external communication.
The response body after alfred_response must contain concluded findings only, not an audit procedure or generic checklist.
Avoid adding claims that need uncollected authoritative sailing-training evidence. Mark such claims UNVERIFIED and phrase them as validation gates.
Do not reopen confirmed D1–D6 or C1 unless a contradiction is demonstrated from the canonical PRD.
current_architecture: Documentation-only project; no codebase or Git repository.
existing_decisions: D4 virtual water + later Korea-context scenarios
D6 physical practice support + weak gamification
C1 L01-L05 all required with Training Sloop
